description:
Generate a comprehensive JSON asset inventory report for the Nx Witness VMS system by querying the REST API at https://localhost:7001. The report must include data for the System, Servers, Cameras, Users, and Layouts, using the credentials admin/Admin1234!. Save the final inventory to /home/ga/Documents/system_inventory.json. Ensure no sensitive data, such as password hashes or auth tokens, is included in the output. The report must follow this structure:

{
  "report_generated_at": "<ISO 8601 timestamp>",
  "system": { ...system info... },
  "servers": [ ...list of servers... ],
  "cameras": [ ...list of devices... ],
  "users": [ ...list of users... ],
  "layouts": [ ...list of layouts... ],
  "summary": {
    "total_servers": <count>,
    "total_cameras": <count>,
    "total_users": <count>,
    "total_layouts": <count>
  }
}
